## Brief
University group project (MT3510). Implement DFA synchronization detection via three methods (transition monoid BFS, image BFS, pair graph), find/compare reset words, and implement three levels of DFA isomorphism testing (strict, weak, semi). Python + NetworkX. Deliverable: clean, tested, well-documented code with a demo notebook.
